2604.09234.title: Statistical Properties of the King Wen Sequence: An Anti-Habituation Structure That Does Not Improve Neural Network Training
2604.09234.paper_summary: The King Wen sequence of the I-Ching (c. 1000 BC) orders 64 hexagrams -- states of a six-dimensional binary space -- in a pattern that has puzzled scholars for three millennia. We present a rigorous statistical characterization of this ordering using Monte Carlo permutation analysis against 100,000 random baselines. We find that the sequence has four statistically significant properties: higher-than-random transition distance (98.2nd percentile), negative lag-1 autocorrelation (p=0.037), yang-balanced groups of four (p=0.002), and asymmetric within-pair vs. between-pair distances (99.2nd percentile). These properties superficially resemble principles from curriculum learning and curiosity-driven exploration, motivating the hypothesis that they might benefit neural network training. We test this hypothesis through three experiments: learning rate schedule modulation, curriculum ordering, and seed sensitivity analysis, conducted across two hardware platforms (NVIDIA RTX 2060 with PyTorch and Apple Silicon with MLX). The results are uniformly negative. King Wen LR modulation degrades performance at all tested amplitudes. As curriculum ordering, King Wen is the worst non-sequential ordering on one platform and within noise on the other. A 30-seed sweep confirms that only King Wen's degradation exceeds natural seed variance. We explain why: the sequence's high variance -- the very property that makes it statistically distinctive -- destabilizes gradient-based optimization. Anti-habituation in a fixed combinatorial sequence is not the same as effective training dynamics.
2604.09234.paper_summary_zh: 周文王的《易經》序列（約公元前1000年）將64個六角形圖形——六維二元空間的狀態——以一種讓學者困惑了三千年的模式排列。我們使用蒙地卡羅置換分析對100,000個隨機基準進行了這一排序的嚴格統計特徵描述。我們發現該序列具有四個統計上顯著的特性：高於隨機的轉移距離（第98.2百分位）、負的滯後1自相關（p=0.037）、四個的陽性平衡組（p=0.002），以及對於配對內與配對間距離的不對稱性（第99.2百分位）。這些特性表面上類似於課程學習和好奇心驅動探索的原則，激發了它們可能有益於神經網絡訓練的假設。我們通過三個實驗來測試這一假設：學習率調度調整、課程排序和種子敏感性分析，這些實驗在兩個硬體平台上進行（NVIDIA RTX 2060搭配PyTorch和Apple Silicon搭配MLX）。結果均為負面。周文王的學習率調整在所有測試的振幅下都降低了性能。作為課程排序，周文王在一個平台上是最差的非序列排序，而在另一個平台上則在噪音範圍內。30個種子掃描確認只有周文王的降級超過了自然種子變異。我們解釋了原因：該序列的高變異性——正是使其在統計上獨特的特性——使基於梯度的優化不穩定。在固定的組合序列中，抗習慣化並不等同於有效的訓練動態。
2604.09234.author: Augustin Chan et.al.
